channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed

item.title: Day6's Young K to Host Solo Tour in the Philippines in February 2027
item.description: Day6's Young K, a prominent South Korean singer, has announced his return to the Philippines for a solo tour scheduled to take place in February 2027. This news was shared by ABS-CBN News on July 19, ...

item.description: Researchers at the University of Sydney have recreated cosmic dust in a laboratory setting, offering new insights into how life's essential chemical ingredients may have formed in space. PhD candidate...

item.title: Slovenian Referee Slavko Vincic to Officiate Spain vs Argentina World Cup Final
item.description: Slavko Vincic, a Slovenian referee, will officiate the 2022 FIFA World Cup final between Spain and Argentina on Sunday, making him the first Slovenian to referee a World Cup final. The 46-year-old, kn...
